acceptance_criteria.text: Generated Template_3 XLSX files with more than 20 segment rows copy visual row/cell formatting from the template data row to every added row on 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS, 2_FRAME_MARKUP, and 3_INDEX_SCORES.
proof: template3_report.py adds _copy_row_format() and applies it to raw and formula-sheet rows added beyond the template.
raw/test-integration.txt proves row 24 style matches row 23 on 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS, 2_FRAME_MARKUP, and 3_INDEX_SCORES.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing formula/value behavior is preserved: added formula-sheet rows still receive translated formulas/static values, and raw rows still receive generated frame ids, seconds, scene descriptions, and term scores.
proof: raw/test-integration.txt proves raw A24=F21, raw B24=20, row 24 formulas exist, and markup formula/static zero cells are preserved.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing cleanup behavior is preserved, including removal of red fills and clean manual markup defaults.
proof: raw/test-integration.txt proves red fills are removed and markup E24:J24 stay 0.

acceptance_criteria.text: Reports with 20 or fewer rows keep the existing behavior.
proof: raw/test-integration.txt proves a 20-row workbook stops at F20 and does not create F21.

acceptance_criteria.text: Focused checks prove syntax, generated workbook style parity for row F21+, formula preservation, and diff hygiene.
proof: raw/build.txt records python -m py_compile template3_report.py passing.
raw/test-unit.txt records direct row-format helper passing.
raw/test-integration.txt records synthetic workbook checks passing.
raw/lint.txt records git diff --check passing with only a line-ending warning.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: Run the _copy_row_format() helper snippet recorded in raw/test-unit.txt.
Run the synthetic Template_3 workbook style/formula snippet recorded in raw/test-integration.txt.
known_gaps: Existing .xlsx files are not modified; reports must be regenerated.
